violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of produce items found stored on the floor of the walk-in cooler. Food items should be stored at least 6 inches off of the floor.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. In-use scoop found stored on top of the ice machine, which is dirty. In-use scoops should be stored in a clean location.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of microwave was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
